description: Complete policy business logic with advanced search, CRUD operations, audit logging, and performance optimization
acceptance_criteria: All policy service methods implemented with async database operations, audit trail integration, advanced search with 9+ criteria, and results returned within 3 seconds

description: Complete claims business logic with policy linking, claim-level overrides, subrogation, and comprehensive audit trails
acceptance_criteria: All claim service methods implemented with policy relationship management, claim-level policy overrides, subrogation referral, and audit trail tracking

description: Complete payment business logic with lifecycle management, multiple payment methods, reserve allocation, and compliance checks
acceptance_criteria: All payment service methods implemented with state machine management, multiple payee support, reserve line allocation, tax withholding, and compliance validation

description: Implement all policy API endpoints with proper validation, error handling, and role-based access control
acceptance_criteria: All policy endpoints return proper responses instead of 501 errors, with validation, authentication, and role-based access control

description: Implement all claim API endpoints with policy integration, audit trail access, and subrogation workflow
acceptance_criteria: All claim endpoints return proper responses instead of 501 errors, with policy integration, claim history, and audit trail access

description: Implement all payment API endpoints with lifecycle management, void/reversal operations, and compliance checks
acceptance_criteria: All payment endpoints return proper responses instead of 501 errors, with lifecycle management, void/reversal operations, and tax reporting

description: Set up Alembic database migrations with proper configuration for async operations and environment management
acceptance_criteria: Alembic properly configured with async support, environment-specific settings, and ready for migration generation

description: Create initial database migration for all models with proper indexes for performance optimization
acceptance_criteria: Database migration creates all tables with proper relationships, constraints, and composite indexes for policy search performance

description: Complete Stripe Connect integration with payment processing, webhook handling, and error recovery
acceptance_criteria: Stripe integration supports payment processing, refunds, webhook handling, and proper error handling with circuit breakers

description: Enhance security utilities with data masking, encryption for sensitive data, and compliance functions
acceptance_criteria: Security utilities provide SSN/TIN masking, payment data encryption, and compliance validation functions

description: Complete audit logging utilities with comprehensive change tracking and user context management
acceptance_criteria: Audit utilities support automatic change tracking, user context preservation, and audit trail generation for all entity operations

description: Enhance API dependencies with improved authentication, role validation, and database session management
acceptance_criteria: API dependencies provide proper JWT token validation, role-based access control, and async database session management

description: Enhance database configuration with connection pooling, performance optimization, and async session management
acceptance_criteria: Database configuration supports proper connection pooling, query optimization, and async session management for concurrent operations

description: Enhance application configuration with environment-specific settings for integrations and performance
acceptance_criteria: Configuration supports all required environment variables for integrations, database connections, and performance tuning

description: Implement integrations with banking systems, Xactimate, EDI 835/837, and document management
acceptance_criteria: External system integrations support ACH/wire transfers, estimate imports, EDI processing, and document attachments with proper error handling

description: Create Alembic configuration file with proper async database URL and migration settings
acceptance_criteria: Alembic configuration properly set up for async database operations with correct connection strings and migration directory
